text: As I stand in this brightly lit, modern corridor, peering through glass at an exhibit titled "R+D," I am struck by a sense of anticipation and curiosity. There is an air of inquiry here—questions about the intersection of human experience, research, and technology. The text on the wall speaks directly to me, reminding me how easily focus can slip away, how perception blurs with the slightest distraction. I feel reflective and somewhat humbled by the reminder of how fragile understanding can be, even in a place dedicated to knowledge and discovery.
